entities.description: As a subsection of '引脚说明', this section provides the detailed definitions of the pin functions and their corresponding signals on the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board.
Refers to the physical connectors on the SOM-TL3588 board that are defined in section 2.2.
Refers to the process of specifying the function and signal mapping of each pin, as outlined in section 2.2.

relations.description: The concept of '引脚' is a primary topic of section 2.2.
